clean_title: Numerical Analysis of Functions and Derivatives
explanation: The provided code defines a set of symbolic functions and computes their derivatives. It then generates two subplots: the first subplot displays the original functions over the interval [-1, 1], while the second subplot shows their derivatives within the interval [-0.99, 0.99]. The plots include legends and labels for clarity, providing a visual analysis of the functions and their rate of change.
name: 2018-01-07_numerical-analysis-hw6
subject: numerical analysis hw6
summary: This project involves the numerical analysis of several mathematical functions and their derivatives using MATLAB.
